OnlyFans has been a money-printing machine for its secretive billionaire owner Leonid Radvinsky. Investors were puzzled by an obscure debt fund’s pitch to buy him out, until they learned of his terminal cancer diagnosis.

The human touch is hard to replace, but there are tasks that are better suited to mechanical engineering. From picking up trash on the beach to delivering water to rooms, these hotels are making the best use of robots to give their staff more time to serve guests.
